prompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
userPrompt: blue mushroom wizard with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff
expandedPrompt: A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with a large, oversized head and sleepy eyes, exuding a magical aura. The silhouette features a rounded mushroom cap as a hat, with subtle gills visible underneath. The body is compact and connected, resembling a cute mascot. The color palette includes various shades of blue for the mushroom cap and body, with soft white spots for texture. The expression is serene and dreamy, emphasizing the sleepy eyes. The tiny glowing staff is adorned with sparkles, adding a sense of enchantment. Additional details include small, whimsical wings on the back and a magical glow surrounding the staff.

{
  "componentName": "BlueMushroomWizard",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Blue Mushroom Wizard",
  "summary": "A whimsical blue mushroom wizard character with sleepy eyes and a tiny glowing staff.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#38bdf8",
    "--dude-secondary": "#60a5fa",
    "--dude-accent": "#93c5fd",
    "--dude-eye": "#e0f2fe",
    "--dude-panel": "rgba(255,255,255,.18)",
    "--dude-mouth": "#0f172a"
  },
  "headShape": "mushroom",
  "bodyShape": "compact",
  "expression": "sleepy",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "wing", "side": "left", "label": "whimsical wing", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "wing", "side": "right", "label": "whimsical wing", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "staff", "label": "tiny glowing staff", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "spot", "label": "soft white spot", "tone": "secondary" }
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Includes oversized mushroom cap as a hat, sleepy eyes with droopy eyelids, tiny glowing staff, soft white spots on the mushroom cap, and small whimsical wings."
  ]
}
